New Delhi","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipNfivJTqMbyc7OKJq6n-weZ3350RWt6DGTfFEq6&fid=0x0:0x525929da7d341ae1"],"When":"2024-10-8"},{"Name":"Prerna Garg","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVKullrRjT2vy6rsYVdQ3fWh2el2Ku5EpaizLwMxeabt8wBZJMPBg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Today, I went to a hospital for the very first time in my life. I went on my friend’s recommendation for my daughter’s eye, just for a second opinion. I reached the hospital at 8:20am, but the parking was quite far, which took us almost 30 minutes to park and walk back to the eye center department. After waiting in line for an hour, we took a token. The guards guided us in taking the token online by downloading the “Driefcase” app.

If you are coming here, make sure you have patience, calmness, time, and a lot of energy to run from one place to another. After running from place to place, from taking the token to the doctor writing for dilation, then going for dilation, and back to the doctor for consultation, our number finally came around 2:10 pm. There was only one doctor, Saurav Banarjee, who must be around 25 (Sitting in Room no. 20) .I noticed he was quite frustrated and losing his patience, repeatedly asking how many patients were left. Towards the end, he was just checking patients for the sake of it and sending them to other rooms.

A lady, who seemed to be around 55, was in front of my daughter. She had a lot of issues, and I could see the doctor was frustrated, but he took almost 30 minutes to check her. Then it was my daughter’s turn. During the examination, when the doctor used a light, my daughter started crying. She is 12 years old and usually cries if a light comes straight into her eyes, though it happens occasionally. The doctor, Mr. Saurav, told me to console her outside and started seeing his next patient. I consoled her there, and she stopped crying, but he forcefully told us to go outside. After five minutes, we came back and waited patiently. He still ignored us and treated 2-4 patients. I requested twice, and he said, “Mein dekh lunga but last me. Mein mana nahi kar raha” (I will check her but last, after all the patients in line).

I got furious because my daughter was now calm. If he could give 30 minutes to the lady, why not to my daughter? That was my only question. But he chose to ignore me and continued treating other patients. He wrenched the card from my daughter’s hand and wrote, “no treatment will happen in any AIIMS.” Seriously??? Damon! This is how government doctors are. Because of such doctors, government hospitals have a bad reputation. Well! I don’t care as I was there only for second opinion. Also he said “I don’t care whatever you’re saying.” Woah!!! Slow claps 👏🏼👏🏼👏🏼
Also, A lady doctor told me, “He’s frustrated as he’s been seeing patients since morning.” Are you serious? It’s your job. If you have such complaints, work in private hospitals or open a clinic. What about us who wake up at 6 am, do all the work, leave home at 7:30, reach at 8:30, and run around like ninjas? Are we complaining?

Gosh! These government hospitals. God bless the people who have to handle their tantrums.

Mr. Saurav, learn some etiquette. Becoming a doctor doesn’t make you a human being.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOmbRM4f3wnhz84FhkuYidn-N3bVonJ1ATa36qf&fid=0x0:0x525929da7d341ae1"],"When":"2024-12-30"},{"Name":"Ashutosh Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWGn5hm0zu5wA9W0tUm1YSlk1XHnsCrG2OTS0bUf0lWoWKiEbMH=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"An Icon of Hope and Medical Excellence

AIIMS Delhi stands as a paragon of healthcare not only within India but across the globe, firmly establishing itself as one of the preeminent medical institutions of our time. Renowned for its exceptional standards of care and unprecedented achievements, AIIMS consistently occupies a distinguished position in worldwide healthcare rankings.

Upon entering the expansive premises, one is immediately struck by the palpable aura of purpose and compassion that permeates the environment. AIIMS is imbued with cutting-edge technology and infrastructure, which together create a milieu conducive to innovative medical practices. The healthcare professionals here are not merely practitioners; they are empathetic caregivers whose commitment to patient welfare is unwavering. Their unparalleled expertise and compassionate demeanor cultivate an atmosphere of healing, comfort, and trust.

AIIMS Delhi does not solely excel in treatment; it is also an eminent research institution that pushes the frontiers of medical knowledge. The facility is dedicated to the advancement of healthcare through rigorous research and innovation, consistently striving to unearth novel treatments and enhance existing therapeutic methodologies. Its plethora of specialized departments offers a comprehensive spectrum of care, turning AIIMS into a sanctuary where millions derive hope and solace during their most trying times.

What distinguishes AIIMS is its unwavering commitment to accessibility. Millions from diverse socioeconomic backgrounds turn to this institution, confident in its ability to provide world-class healthcare services. The affordability of its treatments ensures that quality medical attention is not a privilege reserved for the affluent but a right afforded to all. While patient queues may extend, the resolute dedication to serving every individual is a testament to the institution's ethos of humanity and care.

The hospital’s esteemed global ranking is a testament to the relentless pursuit of excellence exhibited by the entire AIIMS community. It has emerged as a pivotal destination for both national and international patients seeking sophisticated medical interventions. This coveted recognition reflects the tireless efforts of all personnel associated with the institution and underscores the trust bestowed upon AIIMS by families, both near and far, in their times of need.

Moreover, AIIMS makes significant strides in the realm of medical education. It serves as a vibrant epicenter for the training of future healthcare professionals, equipping them with the necessary skills to excel in the field. The institution fosters an educational environment that emphasizes experiential learning, cultivating the understanding that medicine intertwines scientific acumen with profound empathy. As such, the future of healthcare appears promising, buoyed by the initiatives undertaken by AIIMS to nurture the next generation of caregivers.

In summation, AIIMS Delhi transcends the conventional boundaries of a hospital; it symbolizes a beacon of hope for millions. The esteemed institution’s stature as one of the finest hospitals worldwide is a testament to its unwavering commitment to excellence in healthcare. The dedication manifested by the entire workforce—from medical practitioners to administrative staff—epitomizes a remarkable devotion to enhancing patient welfare.

For those in pursuit of exemplary medical care, look no further than AIIMS Delhi. This illustrious institution encapsulates the belief that with compassion, expertise, and relentless dedication, we can indeed transform lives.

Thank you, AIIMS, for standing as a bastion of hope and healing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sAF1QipOeoJX-2XPkDwUtliXJ2UUaqKWTW7nKqV1KVtwJ&fid=0x0:0x525929da7d341ae1"],"When":"2024-9-28"},{"Name":"Chandan Kumar","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUSCLyvg6dn1nsgX87fPT5fHcz0rK_wTVuWoDkHY5_ZLGuimvq5Qw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Services are well as compare to other hospitals but managements are too bad as we thinking there are so much rush in OPD.
